verificationMethod: Read-only local version capture using bounded version and help commands. Outputs are normalized to remove private paths and local host detail.
truthBoundary: Tool presence, installation, or version capture is not treated as proof of security. Evidence-producing status is only used where the repository exposes a repeatable evidence path.

evidenceLockIntegrityPolicy.rule: The public registry records the toolchain state that matches the evidence environment. Do not update or relabel tool versions after evidence capture unless a new evidence bundle is generated and frozen.

projectDependencyReview.fenruaWebDependencyDrift: No dependency drift observed; fenrua-web has no package dependencies.
projectDependencyReview.fenruaKernelDirectDependencyDrift: No direct pnpm dependency drift observed for the inspected kernel package.

postEvidenceMutation.publicSummary: No toolchain, package, OS, or container updates were performed during this website task. Version records are preserved to match the inspected evidence environment.

semgrepExpectation.correctedInstruction: User clarified on 2026-07-12 that the prior expected marker ending in 18 was a typo; the local detected Semgrep version is retained as the source of truth.

pipelines.label: Solidity and EVM security
pipelines.flow: Contract source -> compiler -> unit and integration testing -> static analysis -> fuzzing -> invariant testing -> symbolic execution -> bytecode/runtime inspection -> evidence bundle

pipelines.label: Zero-knowledge and cryptography
pipelines.flow: Circuit source -> compiler -> static circuit inspection -> witness generation -> setup/proving material -> proof generation -> proof verification -> Solidity verifier generation -> EVM integration -> evidence bundle

pipelines.label: Application and web security
pipelines.flow: Application source -> runtime validation -> static link checks -> public discovery checks -> browser-ready static artifact -> evidence bundle

pipelines.label: Languages and native compilation
pipelines.flow: Kernel source -> compiler/toolchain -> native tests -> sanitizer or differential campaign -> regression records -> evidence bundle

pipelines.label: Infrastructure and orchestration
pipelines.flow: Runtime environment -> container/image inventory -> database and chain clients -> read-only telemetry -> safe public status
